nasb.text: But remember the former days, when, after being enlightened, you endured a great conflict of sufferings,

esv.text: But recall the former days when, after you were enlightened, you endured a hard struggle with sufferings,

cnv.text: 你們要回想從前的日子，那時，你們蒙了光照，忍受了許多痛苦的煎熬；

ccb.text: 你们要回想当初的日子，那时你们蒙了光照以后，忍受了各种苦难的煎熬。

csbs.text: 你们要回想原先的日子：当你们蒙了光照以后，忍受了许多痛苦挣扎；
